Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Subspace Drive]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 7''' — The Subspace Drive is a device used to enter Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 7''' — Routing power to the Subspace Drive causes an instant Drive rupture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — The narrator's ship lacks a Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Pilot's gifts evolve the Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The Subspace Drive can be delayed from a distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — The Subspace Drive is a component of starships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Binding-spells can strike a Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Without a Pilot, Horizon is stuck with her default Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Subspace Drive's core is a large, twisting, semi-transparent tube.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — The Subspace Drive can be restored to peace and order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 41''' — Horizon's Subspace Drive has regained its legendary heights with the addition of a Pilot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — The Last Horizon utilizes a Subspace Drive.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — The Subspace Drive on The Last Horizon has a fourteen percent chance of reaching Subspace without rupture.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 8''' — Starhammer has an internal Subspace Drive that is less efficient than a real starship's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Diving into Subspace within a planet's atmosphere is difficult for large ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Diving into Subspace pulls surrounding matter with the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 16''' — The ship utilizes a Subspace Drive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — The Subspace Drive of The Last Horizon is not working correctly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Subspace Drives are a component of the envisioned fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Horizon's Subspace Drive needs to be repaired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — The Subspace Drive can trigger warning alarms.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Subspace Drive is something the narrator prepares.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — The Subspace Drive supports micro-dives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 42''' — The narrator triggered their Subspace Drive to emerge.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — A Subspace Drive is used for subspace travel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — The Vallenar ship uses a Subspace Drive to undock and depart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — The Karoshan facility contains isolated Subspace Drive cores that can rupture in case of a dimensional breach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — The crew used a Subspace Drive to retreat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — The Subspace Drive would fail if Omega attempted to travel too far through the Subspace lock.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
